title: umbilicus rupestris subsp. horizontalis
intro: Umbilicus rupestris subsp. horizontalis, commonly known as the Orpine or Rock Jasmine, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family, characterized by its small, white flowers and thick, fleshy leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Umbilicus rupestris subsp. horizontalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
